title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
